message:
fix(vsdk): bind input_refs to inputs in connector capsule replay and validate config_hash in environment snapshot

Connector universal_verifier_sdk.rs:
Add validate_manifest_input_refs() to enforce that declared input_refs
exactly match the provided inputs keys — no missing, no extra, no
duplicates. Called during replay_capsule() after manifest validation
and before signature verification. Add BTreeSet import and 3 regression
tests covering duplicate input_refs, missing inputs, and undeclared
extra inputs.

SDK replay_capsule.rs:
Add config_hash non-empty validation to validate_environment_snapshot()
so capsules with empty config hashes are rejected at creation and
validation time. Add 2 regression tests for create and validate paths.

SDK verifier_sdk.rs:
Extend environment_present evidence check to include config_hash
presence in the verification report detail string. Add test for empty
config_hash failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
